channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Xaviersobased Announces Debut Australia Tour With Vivid LIVE Date
item.description:
[Intro music fades out]
Host: "What's up, music fans. If you're in Australia, get ready for some exciting news. Rising star xaviersobased is heading down under for the first time, and we've got the details on his upcoming tour dates.
[Short music transition]
Host: "The New York rapper-producer will be kicking off his three-date run in Brisbane on June 3rd at The Princess Theatre, followed by Melbourne's Northcote Theatre on June 4th, and finally, Sydney's Metro Theatre on June 7th as part of the Vivid LIVE festival. Tickets are already on sale, so don't sleep on it.
[Short music transition]
Host: "xaviersobased has been making waves online, building a fast-growing audience and gaining traction on platforms like SoundCloud and TikTok. His debut album 'Xavier' dropped earlier this year to critical acclaim, with Pitchfork calling it 'a cult rap record with big ambition'.
[Short music transition]
Host: "He's also been touring steadily, completing a national run in 2025 and sharing the stage with artists like Yung Lean and Bladee. And for his Australian dates, he'll be joined by support acts ksuuvi and Backend.
[Short music transition]
Host: "So, if you're in Australia, be sure to catch xaviersobased on one of his tour dates. June 3rd in Brisbane, June 4th in Melbourne, and June 7th in Sydney. Don't miss out on this exciting opportunity to see one of the most promising new voices in rap.
[Outro music starts]
Host: "That's it for today. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll catch you on the next one."
